title: Capital deployment readiness for 2026-05-15
body: Codex owns tomorrow's readiness brief, allocator guardrails, checklist, tests, and command-center hygiene. No live submit. Explicit user confirmation only.

title: Stabilize native TOS export path
body: Claude owns thinkorswim native export stabilization and broker UI evidence collection. Do not change capital authority or place trades.

title: Advance paper promotion evidence
body: Tighten approval, fill, and exit loops until the desk produces enough scored paper outcomes to move strategy-lab evidence beyond insufficient-data without weakening authority gates.
